name: Nourt Masr (You Lit Up Egypt)
overview:
Nourt Masr is a cultural TV show broadcast on Egyptian television. It focuses on cultural and heritage topics, often filming episodes at important historical sites in Egypt.

This particular episode takes place inside the Sultan Hassan Mosque in Cairo, showcasing the beauty and history of the location. The episode is prepared by Osama Samir and directed by Hadeer Taha.

trailers.title: برنامج نورت مصر من داخل السلطان حسن   اعداد اسامة سمير  واخراج هدير طه
